Package io.graphite

package io.graphite
Graphite is a modern graph library for Java that provides graph data structures, graph algorithms, graph generation utilities, formatting, benchmarking, and graph input/output facilities.

The library is designed around a clean service-oriented architecture where algorithms are exposed through specialized APIs instead of direct algorithm classes.

Features

  • Mutable and immutable graph implementations
  • Directed and undirected graphs
  • Weighted and unweighted edges
  • Fluent graph builders
  • Random and pattern graph generation
  • Comprehensive graph algorithms
  • Graph formatting and visualization
  • Benchmarking framework

Architecture

Graphite separates graph storage from algorithm execution. Algorithms are grouped into service APIs such as traversal, shortest path, minimum spanning tree, and connectivity, providing a consistent and discoverable public API.

Since:
2.0
Author:
Chinmay
